# Todo App Documentation

A simple full-stack todo application built with Hono (API) and React (UI).

## User Guide

New to the app? The **[User Guide](user-guide)** walks through the UI with screenshots — adding todos, completing them, and managing your list.

## API Reference

| Module | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| [`api/store.ts`](api/store) | Server-side state management: in-memory todo store and CRUD operations. |
| [`api/types.ts`](api/types) | Shared type definitions (Todo, request/response shapes). |

## Frontend

| Module | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| [`ui/App.tsx`](ui/App) | Root React component — renders the todo list and handles user interactions. |
| [`ui/api.ts`](ui/api) | HTTP client utilities for communicating with the Hono API. |
